title: DISSIDIA FINAL FANTASY NT Free Edition

notes:
Played through entire story that was possible, online (unranked), and gauntlet. Without the story DLC, I would rate it a platinum.

Story issues:
1. The first cutscene does not play. All other cutscenes do.
2. The final mission becomes stuck at the loading screen. Seemingly for the same reason that Dead or Alive 6’s story will not work under Proton.
https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2420 ("fixme:dxva2:DXVA2CreateDirect3DDeviceManager9")
